27418.title: Economic Uncertainty Before and During the COVID-19 Pandemic
27418.zh_title: COVID-19大流行之前和期间的经济不确定性
27418.authors: David Altig, Scott R. Baker, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Scarlet Chen, Steven J. Davis, Julia Leather, Brent H. Meyer, Emil Mihaylov, Paul Mizen, Nicholas B. Parker, Thomas Renault, Pawel Smietanka, Greg Thwaites
27418.abstract: We consider several economic uncertainty indicators for the US and UK before and during the COVID-19 pandemic: implied stock market volatility, newspaper-based economic policy uncertainty, twitter chatter about economic uncertainty, subjective uncertainty about future business growth, and disagreement among professional forecasters about future GDP growth. Three results emerge. First, all indicators show huge uncertainty jumps in reaction to the pandemic and its economic fallout. Indeed, most indicators reach their highest values on record. Second, peak amplitudes differ greatly – from a rise of around 100% (relative to January 2020) in two-year implied volatility on the S&P 500 and subjective uncertainty around year-ahead sales for UK firms to a 20-fold rise in forecaster disagreement about UK growth. Third, time paths also differ: Implied volatility rose rapidly from late February, peaked in mid-March, and fell back by late March as stock prices began to recover. In contrast, broader measures of uncertainty peaked later and then plateaued, as job losses mounted, highlighting the difference in uncertainty measures between Wall Street and Main Street.
27418.zh_abstract: 我们考察了COVID-19大流行之前和期间美国和英国的几个经济不确定性指标：隐含股票市场波动率、基于报纸的经济政策不确定性、关于经济不确定性的推特讨论、对未来业务增长的主观不确定性，以及专业预测者对未来GDP增长的分歧。出现了三个结果。首先，所有指标都显示出对疫情及其经济影响反应的巨大不确定性跳跃。事实上，大多数指标达到了有记录以来的最高值。其次，峰值幅度差异很大——从标普500指数两年期隐含波动率和英国企业对未来一年销售的主观不确定性上升约100%（相对于2020年1月），到预测者对英国增长的分歧上升20倍。第三，时间路径也不同：隐含波动率从2月下旬迅速上升，3月中旬达到峰值，然后在3月下旬随着股价开始回升而回落。相比之下，更广泛的不确定性指标峰值出现较晚，然后趋于平稳，因为失业人数增加，这凸显了华尔街和主街之间不确定性指标的差异。

27417.title: Misinformation During a Pandemic
27417.zh_title: 大流行期间的错误信息
27417.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Aakaash Rao, Christopher P. Roth, David H. Yanagizawa-Drott
27417.abstract: Media outlets often present diverging, even conﬂicting, perspectives on reality — not only informing, but potentially misinforming audiences. We study the extent to which misinformation broadcast on mass media at the early stages of the coronavirus pandemic inﬂuenced health outcomes. We ﬁrst document large diﬀerences in content between the two most popular cable news shows in the US, both on the same network, and in the adoption of preventative behaviors among viewers of these shows. Through both a selection-on-observables strategy and an instrumental variable approach, we ﬁnd that areas with greater exposure to the show downplaying the threat of COVID-19 experienced a greater number of cases and deaths. We assess magnitudes through an epidemiological model highlighting the role of externalities and provide evidence that contemporaneous information exposure is a key underlying mechanism.
27417.zh_abstract: 媒体机构经常呈现对现实的分歧甚至冲突的观点——不仅提供信息，还可能误导受众。我们研究了在冠状病毒大流行早期阶段，大众媒体传播的错误信息在多大程度上影响了健康结果。我们首先记录了美国同一网络的两个最受欢迎的有线新闻节目在内容上的巨大差异，以及这些节目观众在采取预防行为方面的差异。通过基于可观测变量的选择策略和工具变量方法，我们发现，对淡化COVID-19威胁的节目曝光度更高的地区，经历了更多的病例和死亡。我们通过一个强调外部性作用的流行病学模型评估了影响程度，并提供了证据表明同期信息暴露是一个关键的基础机制。

27416.title: Treasury Inconvenience Yields during the COVID-19 Crisis
27416.zh_title: 新冠危机期间的国债不便收益率
27416.authors: Zhiguo He, Stefan Nagel, Zhaogang Song
27416.abstract: In sharp contrast to most previous crisis episodes, the Treasury market experienced severe stress and illiquidity during the COVID-19 crisis, raising concerns that the safe-haven status of U.S. Treasuries may be eroding. We document large shifts in Treasury ownership and temporary accumulation of Treasury and reverse repo positions on dealer balance sheets during this period. We build a dynamic equilibrium asset pricing model in which dealers subject to regulatory balance sheet constraints intermediate demand/supply shocks from habitat agents and provide repo financing to levered investors. The model predicts that Treasury inconvenience yields, measured as the spread between Treasuries and overnight-index swap rates (OIS), as well as spreads between dealers’ reverse repo and repo rates, should be highly positive during the COVID-19 crisis, which are confirmed in the data. The same model framework, adapted to the institutional setting in 2007-2009, also helps explain the negative Treasury-OIS spread observed during the Great Recession.
27416.zh_abstract: 与以往大多数危机事件形成鲜明对比的是，美国国债市场在新冠危机期间经历了严重的压力和流动性不足，引发了对美国国债避险地位可能正在削弱的担忧。我们记录了这一时期国债所有权的巨大转变，以及交易商资产负债表上国债和逆回购头寸的暂时积累。我们构建了一个动态均衡资产定价模型，在该模型中，受监管资产负债表约束的交易商为来自栖息地代理人的需求/供给冲击提供中介，并向杠杆投资者提供回购融资。该模型预测，在新冠危机期间，国债的不便收益率（以国债与隔夜指数互换利率（OIS）之间的利差衡量）以及交易商逆回购与回购利率之间的利差应高度为正，这些预测在数据中得到了证实。同样的模型框架，经过调整以适应2007-2009年的制度环境，也有助于解释在大衰退期间观察到的负国债-OIS利差。
27416.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E5, G01, G21, G23

27415.title: Conservation Co-Benefits from Air Pollution Regulation: Evidence from Birds
27415.zh_title: 空气污染监管的保护协同效益：来自鸟类的证据
27415.authors: Yuanning Liang, Ivan J. Rudik, Eric Zou, Alison Johnston, Amanda D. Rodewald, Catherine L. Kling
27415.abstract: Massive wildlife losses over the past 50 years have brought new urgency to identifying both the drivers of population decline and potential solutions. We provide the first large-scale evidence that air pollution, specifically ozone, is associated with declines in bird abundance in the United States. We show that an air pollution regulation limiting ozone precursors emissions has delivered substantial benefits to bird conservation. Our estimates imply that air quality improvements over the past four decades have stemmed the decline in bird populations, averting the loss of 1.5 billion birds, approximately 20 percent of current totals. Our results highlight that in addition to protecting human health, air pollution regulations have previously unrecognized and unquantified conservation co-benefits.
27415.zh_abstract: 过去50年间大规模的野生动物损失，为识别种群下降的驱动因素和潜在解决方案带来了新的紧迫性。我们首次提供了大规模证据，表明空气污染（特别是臭氧）与美国鸟类数量的下降有关。我们证明，一项限制臭氧前体物排放的空气污染法规为鸟类保护带来了显著效益。我们的估算表明，过去四十年间的空气质量改善遏制了鸟类种群的下降，避免了15亿只鸟类的损失，约占当前总数的20%。我们的结果强调，除了保护人类健康外，空气污染法规还具有此前未被认识和量化的保护协同效益。

27414.title: Food, Fuel and the Domesday Economy
27414.zh_title: 食物、燃料与末日审判书经济
27414.abstract: This paper develops a theory where access to food and fuel energy is critical to the location, number, and size of human settlements. By combining our theory with a simple Malthusian mechanism, we generate predictions for the distribution of economic activity and population across geographic space. We evaluate the model using data drawn from the very first census undertaken in the English language - the Domesday census - commissioned by William the Conqueror in 1086 A.D. Using G.I.S. data and techniques we find strong evidence that Malthusian forces determined the population size and the number of settlements in Domesday England.
27414.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一个理论，其中获取食物和燃料能源对于人类定居点的位置、数量和规模至关重要。通过将我们的理论与一个简单的马尔萨斯机制相结合，我们生成了关于经济活动和人口在地理空间上分布的预测。我们使用来自英语世界首次人口普查——即征服者威廉于公元1086年下令进行的《末日审判书》普查——的数据来评估该模型。利用地理信息系统（G.I.S.）数据和技术，我们发现了强有力的证据，表明马尔萨斯力量决定了末日审判书时期英格兰的人口规模和定居点数量。

27413.title: Nondogmatic Climate Policy
27413.abstract: Disagreements about normative aspects of social time preferences have led to estimates of the Social Cost of Carbon (SCC) that differ by orders of magnitude. We investigate how disagreements about the SCC change if planners are non-dogmatic, i.e., they admit the possibility of a change in their normative views, and internalise the preferences of future selves. Although non-dogmatic planners may disagree about all the contentious aspects of social time preferences, disagreements about the SCC reduce dramatically. Admitting the possibility of a change in views once every 40 years results in a 4.6-fold reduction in the range of recommended SCCs.
27413.zh_abstract: 关于社会时间偏好规范性方面的分歧，导致了对碳社会成本（SCC）的估算相差数个数量级。我们研究了如果规划者是非教条式的，即他们承认其规范性观点可能发生改变，并内化未来自我的偏好，那么关于SCC的分歧将如何变化。尽管非教条式规划者可能在社会时间偏好的所有有争议方面存在分歧，但关于SCC的分歧会显著减少。承认每40年观点可能发生一次改变，会导致建议的SCC范围缩小4.6倍。

27412.title: Betting on the House: Subjective Expectations and Market Choices
27412.zh_title: 押注房产：主观预期与市场选择
27412.abstract: Home price expectations play a central role in macroeconomics and finance. However, there is little direct evidence on how home price expectations affect market choices. We provide the first causal evidence based on a large-scale, high-stakes, and naturally occurring field experiment in the United States. We mailed letters with information on trends in home prices to 57,910 homeowners who had listed their homes on the market. Collectively, these homes were worth $\$34$ billion. We randomized the information contained in the mailing to create non-deceptive, exogenous variation in the subjects’ home price expectations. We then used rich administrative data to measure the effects of these information shocks on the subjects’ market choices. We found that, consistent with economic theory, higher home price expectations caused a reduction in the probability of selling the home. These effects were highly statistically significant, economically large in magnitude, and robust to a number of sharp checks. Our results indicated that market choices were highly elastic to expectations: a 1 percentage point increase in home price expectations caused a 2.63 percentage point reduction in the probability of selling the property within 12 weeks.
27412.zh_abstract: 房价预期在宏观经济学和金融学中扮演着核心角色。然而，关于房价预期如何影响市场选择的直接证据很少。我们基于美国一项大规模、高 stakes 且自然发生的实地实验，提供了首个因果证据。我们向57,910名已在市场上挂牌出售房屋的房主邮寄了包含房价趋势信息的信件。这些房屋的总价值为340亿美元。我们对邮件中包含的信息进行了随机化处理，以在受试者的房价预期中创造非欺骗性的外生变异。然后，我们使用丰富的行政数据来衡量这些信息冲击对受试者市场选择的影响。我们发现，与经济理论一致，更高的房价预期导致出售房屋的概率降低。这些影响在统计上高度显著，经济规模巨大，并且对一系列严格的检验具有稳健性。我们的结果表明，市场选择对预期具有高度弹性：房价预期每增加1个百分点，在12周内出售房产的概率就会降低2.63个百分点。
27412.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：C81, C93, D83, D84, R31

27411.title: Financial Vulnerability and Risks to Growth in Emerging Markets
27411.zh_title: 新兴市场的金融脆弱性与增长风险
27411.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Soumya Bhadury, Jay Surti
27411.abstract: This paper introduces a new financial vulnerability index for emerging market economies by exploiting key differences in their business cycles relative to those of advanced economies. Information on the domestic price of risk, cost of dollar hedging and market-based measures of bank vulnerability combine to generate indexes significantly more effective in capturing macro-financial vulnerability and stress compared to those based on information in trade and global factors. Our index significantly augments early warning surveillance capacity, as evidenced by out-of-sample forecasting gains around a majority of turning points in GDP growth, relative to distributed lag models that are augmented with information from macro-financial indexes that are custom-built to optimize such forecasts.
27411.zh_abstract: 本文通过利用新兴市场经济体相对于发达经济体商业周期的关键差异，引入了一个新的金融脆弱性指数。国内风险价格、美元对冲成本以及基于市场的银行脆弱性衡量指标的信息相结合，生成的指数在捕捉宏观金融脆弱性和压力方面，显著优于基于贸易和全球因素信息的指数。我们的指数显著增强了早期预警监测能力，这通过围绕大多数GDP增长转折点的样本外预测增益得到证明，相比之下，那些为优化此类预测而定制构建的宏观金融指数所增强的分布滞后模型表现更差。

27410.title: Biases in Long-Horizon Predictive Regressions
27410.zh_title: 长 horizon 预测回归中的偏差
27410.authors: Jacob Boudoukh, Ronen Israel, Matthew P. Richardson
27410.abstract: Analogous to Stambaugh (1999), this paper derives the small sample bias of estimators in J-horizon predictive regressions, providing a plug-in adjustment for these estimators. A number of surprising results emerge, including (i) a higher bias for overlapping than nonoverlapping regressions despite the greater number of observations, and (ii) particularly higher bias for an alternative long-horizon predictive regression commonly advocated for in the literature. For large J, the bias is linear in (J/T) with a slope that depends on the predictive variable’s persistence. The bias adjustment substantially reduces the existing magnitude of long-horizon estimates of predictability.
27410.zh_abstract: 类似于Stambaugh (1999)，本文推导了J-horizon预测回归中估计量的小样本偏差，并为这些估计量提供了一种插件调整方法。出现了一些令人惊讶的结果，包括：(i) 尽管重叠回归的观测值更多，但其偏差高于非重叠回归；(ii) 文献中常提倡的另一种长 horizon 预测回归的偏差尤其高。对于较大的J，偏差与(J/T)呈线性关系，其斜率取决于预测变量的持续性。偏差调整显著降低了现有长 horizon 可预测性估计的幅度。
27410.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C01, C1, C22, C53, C58, G12, G17

27409.title: Salience and Taxation with Imperfect Competition
27409.zh_title: 不完全竞争下的显著性与税收
27409.authors: Kory Kroft, Jean-William P. Laliberté, René Leal-Vizcaíno, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
27409.abstract: This paper studies commodity taxation in a model featuring heterogeneous consumers, imperfect competition, and tax salience. We derive new formulas for the incidence and marginal excess burden of commodity taxation, and we find that tax salience and market structure interact when considering tax incidence but do not directly interact when considering the marginal excess burden. We estimate the necessary inputs to the formulas by combining Nielsen Retail Scanner data from grocery stores in the US with detailed sales tax data. We calibrate our new formulas and conclude that the incidence of sales taxes on consumers is increasing in tax salience, and the marginal excess burden of taxation is larger than standard formulas that ignore imperfect competition and tax salience.
27409.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个包含异质性消费者、不完全竞争和税收显著性的模型中的商品税。我们推导了商品税归宿和边际超额负担的新公式，并发现，在考虑税收归宿时，税收显著性和市场结构会相互作用，但在考虑边际超额负担时，它们并不直接相互作用。我们通过将美国杂货店的尼尔森零售扫描仪数据与详细的销售税数据相结合，估算了公式所需的必要输入。我们校准了新的公式，并得出结论：销售税对消费者的归宿随着税收显著性的增加而增加，并且税收的边际超额负担大于忽略不完全竞争和税收显著性的标准公式所得到的结果。

27408.title: Black Lives Matter Protests and Risk Avoidance: The Case of Civil Unrest During a Pandemic
27408.zh_title: 黑人的命也是命抗议活动与风险规避：疫情期间社会动荡的案例
27408.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia, Samuel Safford
27408.abstract: Sparked by the killing of George Floyd in police custody, the 2020 Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests brought a new wave of attention to the issue of inequality within criminal justice. However, some policymakers warned that such protests should be curtailed due to public health risks of infectious disease contagion. The current study finds that this epidemiological argument rests on an incorrect counterfactual that ignores economic incentives for risk-avoiding behaviors. We use newly collected data on BLM protests and anonymized cell phone data from SafeGraph, Inc. to estimate the impacts of BLM protests on (i) stay-at-home behavior, and (ii) foot-traffic to restaurants/bars, retail establishments, and business service locations. Event-study analyses provide strong evidence that net stay-at-home behavior increased following protest onset, consistent with the hypothesis that non-protesters shifted their activity in response to the perceived heightened risk of contagion and protest-related violence. Moreover, we find that the types of activities that were averted by BLM protests were potentially riskier for disease spread than outdoor civil rights protests: restaurant and bar-going and retail shopping. These risk-avoiding responses to protests, coupled with mask-wearing by protesters, explain why BLM protests did not reignite community-level COVID-19 growth. Together, our findings highlight the pitfalls of ignoring general equilibrium effects in assessing the net economic impacts of civil rights protests.
27408.zh_abstract: 由乔治·弗洛伊德在警方拘留期间被杀引发的2020年“黑人的命也是命”（BLM）抗议活动，为刑事司法中的不平等问题带来了新一轮关注。然而，一些政策制定者警告称，由于传染病传播的公共卫生风险，此类抗议活动应受到限制。本研究发现，这种流行病学论点建立在一个错误的反事实基础上，忽略了风险规避行为的经济激励。我们利用新收集的BLM抗议活动数据以及来自SafeGraph公司的匿名手机数据，估计了BLM抗议活动对（i）居家行为以及（ii）餐厅/酒吧、零售场所和商业服务地点客流量产生的影响。事件研究分析提供了强有力的证据，表明抗议活动开始后净居家行为有所增加，这与非抗议者因感知到更高的传染风险和抗议相关暴力风险而改变其活动的假设一致。此外，我们发现，BLM抗议活动所规避的活动类型（如外出就餐、逛酒吧和零售购物）在疾病传播方面可能比户外民权抗议活动风险更高。这些对抗议活动的风险规避反应，加上抗议者佩戴口罩，解释了为何BLM抗议活动并未重新引发社区层面的COVID-19增长。总之，我们的研究结果凸显了在评估民权抗议活动的净经济影响时忽视一般均衡效应的陷阱。

27407.title: Racial Disparity in COVID-19 Deaths: Seeking Economic Roots with Census data.
27407.zh_title: COVID-19死亡中的种族差异：利用人口普查数据探寻经济根源
27407.abstract: This note seeks the socioeconomic roots of racial disparities in COVID-19 mortality, using county-level mortality, economic, and demographic data from 3,140 counties. For all minorities, the minority's population share is strongly correlated with total COVID-19 deaths. For Hispanic/Latino and Asian minorities those correlations are fragile, and largely disappear when we control for education, occupation, and commuting patterns. For African Americans and First Nations populations, the correlations are very robust. Surprisingly, for these two groups the racial disparity does not seem to be due to differences in income, poverty rates, education, occupational mix, or even access to healthcare insurance. A significant portion of the disparity can, however, be sourced to the use of public transit.
27407.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自3140个县的县级死亡率、经济和人口统计数据，探寻COVID-19死亡率中种族差异的社会经济根源。对于所有少数族裔而言，少数族裔人口比例与COVID-19总死亡人数密切相关。对于西班牙裔/拉丁裔和亚裔少数族裔，这些相关性较弱，并且在控制教育、职业和通勤模式后基本消失。对于非裔美国人和原住民群体，这些相关性非常稳健。令人惊讶的是，对于这两个群体，种族差异似乎并非由收入、贫困率、教育、职业构成甚至医疗保险获取方面的差异所致。然而，差异的很大一部分可以归因于公共交通的使用。

27406.title: Belief Distortions and Macroeconomic Fluctuations
27406.zh_title: 信念扭曲与宏观经济波动
27406.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma
27406.abstract: This paper combines a data rich environment with a machine learning algorithm to provide new estimates of time-varying systematic expectational errors ("belief distortions") embedded in survey responses. We find that distortions are large even for professional forecasters, with all respondent-types over-weighting their own beliefs relative to publicly available information. Forecasts of inflation and GDP growth oscillate between optimism and pessimism by large margins, with biases in expectations evolving dynamically in response to cyclical shocks. The results suggest that artificial intelligence algorithms can be productively deployed to correct errors in human judgement and improve predictive accuracy.
27406.zh_abstract: 本文将丰富的数据环境与机器学习算法相结合，提供了嵌入在调查回应中的时变系统性预期误差（“信念扭曲”）的新估计。我们发现，即使是专业预测者，其扭曲也很大，所有受访者类型都相对于公开可用信息过度重视自身信念。对通胀和GDP增长的预测在乐观与悲观之间大幅摇摆，预期偏差随着周期性冲击动态演变。结果表明，人工智能算法可以有效地用于纠正人类判断中的错误并提高预测准确性。
27406.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E03, E17, E7

27405.title: The Effect of Price on Firm Reputation
27405.zh_title: 价格对企业声誉的影响
27405.abstract: While a business's reputation can affect its pricing, prices can also affect its reputation. To explore the effect of prices on reputation, we investigate daily data on menu prices and online ratings from a large rating and ordering platform. We find that a price increase of 1% leads to a decrease of 3%-5% in the average rating. Consistent with this, the overall distribution of ratings for cheaper restaurants is similar to that of more expensive restaurants. Finally, these effects don't seem to be driven by consumer retaliation against price changes, but by changes in absolute price levels.
27405.zh_abstract: 虽然企业的声誉会影响其定价，但价格也会影响其声誉。为了探究价格对声誉的影响，我们研究了来自一个大型评级和订购平台的菜单价格和在线评级的每日数据。我们发现，价格上涨1%会导致平均评级下降3%-5%。与此一致的是，较便宜餐厅的评级总体分布与较昂贵餐厅的评级分布相似。最后，这些影响似乎并非由消费者对价格变化的报复行为驱动，而是由绝对价格水平的变化驱动。

27404.title: From Imitation to Innovation: Where Is all that Chinese R&D Going?
27404.zh_title: 从模仿到创新：中国的研发投入都去了哪里？
27404.authors: Michael König, Zheng Michael Song, Kjetil Storesletten, Fabrizio Zilibotti
27404.abstract: We construct an endogenous growth model with random interactions where ﬁrms are subject to distortions. The TFP distribution evolves endogenously as ﬁrms seek to upgrade their technology over time either by innovating or by imitating other ﬁrms. We use the model to quantify the eﬀects of misallocation on TFP growth in emerging economies. We structurally estimate the stationary state of the dynamic model targeting moments of the empirical distribution of R&D and TFP growth in China during the period 2007–12. The estimated model ﬁts the Chinese data well. We compare the estimates with those obtained using data for Taiwan and perform counterfactuals to study the eﬀect of alternative policies. R&D misallocation has a large eﬀect on TFP growth.
27404.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有随机交互作用的内生增长模型，其中企业面临扭曲。全要素生产率（TFP）分布随着企业寻求随时间升级其技术（通过创新或模仿其他企业）而内生演化。我们利用该模型量化资源错配对新兴经济体TFP增长的影响。我们以2007-2012年间中国研发和TFP增长的经验分布矩为目标，对动态模型的稳态进行了结构性估计。估计模型很好地拟合了中国数据。我们将估计结果与使用台湾数据获得的结果进行比较，并进行反事实分析以研究替代政策的效果。研发资源错配对TFP增长有显著影响。

27403.title: The Economics of Sovereign Debt, Bailouts and the Eurozone Crisis
27403.zh_title: 主权债务、救助与欧元区危机的经济学分析
27403.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Philippe Martin, Todd E. Messer
27403.abstract: Despite a formal ‘no-bailout clause’, we estimate significant net present value transfers from the European Union to Cyprus, Greece, Ireland, Portugal and Spain, ranging from roughly 0.5% (Ireland) to 43% (Greece) of 2011 output during the recent Eurozone crisis. We propose a model to analyze and understand bailouts in a monetary union, and the large observed differences across countries. We characterize bailout size and likelihood as a function of the economic fundamentals (economic activity, debt-to-gdp ratio, default costs). Our model embeds a ‘Southern view’ of the crisis (transfers did not help) and a ‘Northern view’ (transfers weaken fiscal discipline). While a stronger no-bailout commitment reduces risk-shifting, it may not be optimal from the perspective of the creditor country, even ex-ante, if it increases the risk of immediate insolvency for high debt countries. Hence, the model provides a potential justification for the often decried policy of ‘kicking the can down the road’.
27403.zh_abstract: 尽管存在正式的“不救助条款”，我们估计在最近的欧元区危机期间，欧盟向塞浦路斯、希腊、爱尔兰、葡萄牙和西班牙提供了显著的净现值转移，范围从约占2011年产出的0.5%（爱尔兰）到43%（希腊）不等。我们提出了一个模型来分析和理解货币联盟中的救助行为以及各国之间观察到的巨大差异。我们将救助规模和可能性描述为经济基本面（经济活动、债务与GDP比率、违约成本）的函数。我们的模型包含了危机的“南方观点”（转移支付无济于事）和“北方观点”（转移支付削弱财政纪律）。虽然更强的不救助承诺减少了风险转移，但从债权国的角度来看，即使事前，如果它增加了高债务国立即破产的风险，也可能并非最优。因此，该模型为经常被批评的“踢皮球”政策提供了潜在的理由。

27402.title: Which Investors Matter for Equity Valuations and Expected Returns?
27402.zh_title: 哪些投资者对股票估值和预期回报至关重要？
27402.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Robert J. Richmond, Motohiro Yogo
27402.abstract: Based on an asset demand system, we develop a framework to quantify the impact of market trends and changes in regulation on asset prices, price informativeness, and the wealth distribution. Our leading applications are the transition from active to passive investment management and climate-induced shifts in asset demand. The transition from active to passive investment management had a large impact on equity prices but a small impact on price informativeness because capital did not flow from more to less informed investors on average. This finding is based on a new measure of investor-level informativeness that identifies which investors are more informed about future profitability. Climate-induced shifts in asset demand have a potentially large impact on equity prices and the wealth distribution, implying capital gains for passive investment advisors, pension funds, insurance companies, and private banking and capital losses for active investment advisors and hedge funds.
27402.zh_abstract: 基于资产需求系统，我们开发了一个框架来量化市场趋势和监管变化对资产价格、价格信息含量以及财富分配的影响。我们的主要应用是从主动投资管理向被动投资管理的转变以及气候引发的资产需求变化。从主动投资管理向被动投资管理的转变对股票价格产生了巨大影响，但对价格信息含量的影响较小，因为平均而言，资本并未从信息更丰富的投资者流向信息较少的投资者。这一发现基于一种新的投资者层面信息含量衡量标准，该标准识别出哪些投资者对未来盈利能力更为了解。气候引发的资产需求变化可能对股票价格和财富分配产生巨大影响，这意味着被动投资顾问、养老基金、保险公司和私人银行业务将获得资本收益，而主动投资顾问和对冲基金将遭受资本损失。

27401.title: The Political Scar of Epidemics
27401.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Orkun Saka, Cevat Giray Aksoy
27401.abstract: Epidemic exposure in an individual’s “impressionable years” (ages 18 to 25) has a persistent negative effect on confidence in political institutions and leaders. This loss of trust is associated with epidemic-induced economic difficulties, such as lower income and unemployment later in life. It is observed for political institutions and leaders only and does not carry over to other institutions and individuals. A key exception is a strong negative effect on confidence in public health systems. This suggests that the distrust in political institutions and leaders is associated with the (in)effectiveness of a government’s healthcare-related response to epidemics. We show that the loss of political trust is largest for individuals who experienced epidemics under weak governments with low policymaking capacity, and confirm that weak governments in fact took longer to introduce policy interventions in response to COVID-19. We report evidence that the epidemic-induced loss of political trust discourages electoral participation in the long term.
27401.zh_abstract: 在个人“可塑性年龄”（18至25岁）期间经历流行病，会对其政治制度和领导人的信心产生持久的负面影响。这种信任的丧失与流行病引发的经济困难有关，例如晚年收入较低和失业。这种影响仅针对政治制度和领导人观察到，并未延伸至其他制度和个人。一个关键的例外是对公共卫生系统信心的强烈负面影响。这表明，对政治制度和领导人的不信任与政府应对流行病的医疗相关措施的（无）效性有关。我们表明，对于在政策制定能力薄弱的弱势政府下经历流行病的个人，其政治信任的丧失最大，并证实弱势政府在应对COVID-19时确实花了更长时间才引入政策干预。我们报告的证据表明，流行病引发的政治信任丧失会长期抑制选举参与。

27400.title: Economic Crisis, General Laws, and the Mid-Nineteenth-Century Transformation of American Political Economy
27400.zh_title: 经济危机、一般法律与19世纪中叶美国政治经济转型
27400.authors: Naomi R. Lamoreaux, John Joseph Wallis
27400.abstract: Before the middle of the nineteenth century most laws enacted in the United States were special bills that granted favors to specific individuals, groups, or localities. This fundamentally inegalitarian system provided political elites with important tools that they could use to reward supporters, and as a result, they were only willing to modify it under very special circumstances. In the early 1840s, however, a major fiscal crisis forced a number of states to default on their bonded debt, unleashing a political earthquake that swept this system away. Starting with Indiana in 1851, states revised their constitutions to ban the most common types of special legislation and, at the same time, mandate that all laws be general in their application. These provisions dramatically changed the way government and the economy worked and interacted, giving rise to the modern regulatory state, interest-group politics, and a more dynamic form of capitalism.
27400.zh_abstract: 在19世纪中叶之前，美国颁布的大多数法律都是向特定个人、群体或地方授予特权的特别法案。这种从根本上不平等制度为政治精英提供了奖励支持者的重要工具，因此他们只愿意在非常特殊的情况下修改它。然而，在19世纪40年代初，一场重大的财政危机迫使多个州对其债券债务违约，引发了一场政治地震，扫除了这一制度。从1851年印第安纳州开始，各州修订宪法，禁止最常见的特别立法类型，同时强制要求所有法律在适用上具有普遍性。这些条款极大地改变了政府与经济运作及互动的方式，催生了现代监管国家、利益集团政治以及更具活力的资本主义形式。

27456.title: Political Power, Elite Control, and Long-Run Development: Evidence from Brazil
27456.zh_title: 政治权力、精英控制与长期发展：来自巴西的证据
27456.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Frederico Finan, Monica Martinez-Bravo
27456.abstract: This paper analyzes how changes in the concentration of political power affect long-run development. We study Brazil’s military dictatorship whose rise to power dramatically altered the distribution of power of local political elites. We document that municipalities that were more politically concentrated prior to the dictatorship in the 1960s are relatively richer in 2000, despite being poorer initially. Our evidence suggests that this reversal of fortune was the result of the military’s policies aimed at undermining the power of traditional elites. These policies increased political competition locally, which ultimately led to better governance, more public goods, and higher income levels.
27456.zh_abstract: 本文分析了政治权力集中度的变化如何影响长期发展。我们研究了巴西的军事独裁政权，该政权的崛起极大地改变了地方政治精英的权力分配。我们记录到，在1960年代独裁统治之前政治集中度更高的市镇，尽管最初较为贫困，但在2000年却相对更富裕。我们的证据表明，这种命运逆转是军方旨在削弱传统精英权力的政策的结果。这些政策增加了地方政治竞争，最终带来了更好的治理、更多的公共品和更高的收入水平。

27455.title: Income-driven Labor Market Polarization
27455.zh_title: 收入驱动的劳动力市场极化
27455.authors: Diego A. Comin, Ana Danieli, Martí Mestieri
27455.abstract: We propose a mechanism for labor-market polarization based on the nonhomotheticity of demand that we call the income-driven channel. Our mechanism builds on a novel empirical fact: expenditure elasticities and production intensities in low- and high-skill occupations are positively correlated across sectors. Thus, as income grows, demand shifts towards expenditure-elastic sectors, and the relative demand for low- and high-skill occupations increases, causing labor-market polarization. A calibrated general-equilibrium model suggests this mechanism accounts for 90% and 35% of the increase in the wage-bill share of low- and high-skill occupations observed in the US during 1980-2016, and for 64% and 28% of the rise in the employment shares of low- and high-skill occupations. This mechanism is similarly important for the polarization of labor markets in Western Europe during 1980-2016, as well as in the US during earlier decades and, possibly, the near future.
27455.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于需求非位似性的劳动力市场极化机制，称之为收入驱动渠道。该机制建立在一个新颖的实证事实之上：跨部门来看，低技能和高技能职业的支出弹性与生产密集度呈正相关。因此，随着收入增长，需求转向支出弹性高的部门，低技能和高技能职业的相对需求增加，导致劳动力市场极化。一个校准的一般均衡模型表明，这一机制解释了1980-2016年间美国低技能和高技能职业工资份额增长的90%和35%，以及就业份额增长的64%和28%。该机制对于1980-2016年西欧劳动力市场的极化，以及美国更早时期乃至可能近期的极化同样重要。
27455.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E21, E23, J23, J31

27454.title: The Performance of Hedge Fund Performance Fees
27454.zh_title: 对冲基金业绩报酬的表现
27454.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Justin Birru, Andrea Rossi
27454.abstract: We study the long-run outcomes associated with hedge funds' compensation structure. Over a 22-year period, the aggregate effective incentive fee rate is 2.5 times the average contractual rate (i.e., around 50% instead of 20%). Overall, investors collected 36 cents for every dollar earned on their invested capital (over a risk-free hurdle rate and before adjusting for any risk). In the cross-section of funds, there is a substantial disconnect between lifetime performance and incentive fees earned. These poor outcomes stem from the asymmetry of the performance contract, investors' return-chasing behavior, and underwater fund closures.
27454.zh_abstract: 我们研究了对冲基金薪酬结构相关的长期结果。在22年的时间里，总有效激励费率是平均合同费率的2.5倍（即约50%而非20%）。总体而言，投资者每从投资资本中赚取一美元（超过无风险门槛利率且未进行任何风险调整），仅能收回36美分。在基金的横截面上，终身业绩与赚取的激励费之间存在显著脱节。这些糟糕的结果源于业绩合同的不对称性、投资者的追逐回报行为以及水下基金的关闭。

27453.title: Towards a Dynamic Disequilibrium Theory with Randomness
27453.zh_title: 迈向带有随机性的动态非均衡理论
27453.authors: Martin M. Guzman, Joseph E. Stiglitz
27453.abstract: Most macroeconomic crises, such as the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, are associated with endogenous large changes in beliefs and understandings about the workings of the economy. Such downturns and crises are not consistent with the standard paradigm of a well-functioning competitive economy, and macroeconomic equilibrium models based on that paradigm have failed to predict the possibility of those downturns, to explain them, or even to design appropriate policy responses. The framework assumes there are no macroeconomic inconsistencies—all plans are realized, all budget constraints honored. \nIn this paper, we present a dynamic disequilibrium theory with randomness that is based on the premise that a better way to understand deep downturns is to think of the economy experiencing a constant evolution, marked by uncertainty, in which there is continual learning about the economic system. Our framework explains why macroeconomic inconsistencies may arise and investigates their consequences. We explain why decentralized market forces may be disequilibrating. We identify the crucial departures from the Arrow-Debreu assumptions and those underlying DSGE models, emphasizing the limitations in the assumption of equilibrium and the absence of a coherent theory of how it is attained, the incompleteness of markets and the non-stationarity of the stochastic processes describing the economy. We analyze the policy implications of this alternative theory, which typically differ markedly from those of the standard model: In particular, the consequences for the effectiveness of different monetary and fiscal policies, and the eventual need of debt restructuring policies to restore macroeconomic consistency.
27453.zh_abstract: 大多数宏观经济危机，例如2008年全球金融危机，都与关于经济运作方式的信念和理解的內生性巨大变化相关。这种衰退和危机与运行良好的竞争性经济的标准范式不一致，基于该范式的宏观经济均衡模型未能预测这些衰退的可能性、解释它们，甚至未能设计出适当的政策应对。该框架假设不存在宏观经济不一致性——所有计划都得以实现，所有预算约束都得到遵守。在本文中，我们提出了一个带有随机性的动态非均衡理论，其前提是理解深度衰退的更好方式是将经济视为经历着以不确定性为标志的持续演化，其中存在对经济体系的持续学习。我们的框架解释了宏观经济不一致性为何可能出现，并研究了其后果。我们解释了为何分散化的市场力量可能具有非均衡性。我们识别了与阿罗-德布鲁假设以及DSGE模型基础假设的关键偏离，强调了均衡假设的局限性以及缺乏关于如何达到均衡的连贯理论、市场的不完全性以及描述经济的随机过程的非平稳性。我们分析了这一替代理论的政策含义，这些含义通常与标准模型显著不同：特别是对不同货币和财政政策有效性的影响，以及最终需要债务重组政策来恢复宏观经济一致性。

27452.title: Personal Wealth and Self-Employment
27452.authors: Aymeric Bellon, J. Anthony Cookson, Erik P. Gilje, Rawley Z. Heimer
27452.abstract: We examine how wealth windfalls affect self-employment decisions using data on cash payments from claims on Texas shale drilling to people throughout the United States. Individuals who receive large wealth shocks (greater than $\$50,000$) have 51% higher self-employment rates. The increase in self-employment rates is driven by individuals who lengthen existing self-employment spells, and not by individuals who leave regular employment for self-employment. Moreover, the effect of wealth reverts for individuals whose payments run out. Rather than alleviating a financial constraint, our evidence suggests that unrestricted cash windfalls affect self-employment decisions primarily through self-employment’s non-pecuniary benefits.
27452.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自德克萨斯州页岩钻探索赔的现金支付数据（覆盖全美各地个人），研究了财富意外收益如何影响自雇就业决策。获得大额财富冲击（超过5万美元）的个人，其自雇就业率高出51%。自雇就业率的上升是由延长现有自雇就业期的个人推动的，而非由离开正规就业转向自雇就业的个人推动。此外，对于支付到期的个人，财富效应会逆转。我们的证据表明，无限制的现金意外收益并非通过缓解财务约束，而主要是通过自雇就业的非金钱收益来影响自雇就业决策。

27451.title: Pandemic Shocks and Fiscal-Monetary Policies in the Eurozone: COVID-19 Dominance During January - June 2020
27451.zh_title: 欧元区的疫情冲击与财政货币政策：2020年1月至6月的COVID-19主导地位
27451.authors: Yothin Jinjarak, Rashad Ahmed, Sameer Nair-Desai, Weining Xin, Joshua Aizenman
27451.abstract: We compare the importance of market factors against that of COVID-19 dynamics and policy responses in explaining Eurozone sovereign spreads. First, we estimate a multifactor model for changes in credit default swap (CDS) spreads over January 2014 - June 2019. Then, we apply a synthetic control-type procedure to extrapolate model-implied changes in the CDS. The factor model does very well over the rest of 2019 but breaks down during the pandemic, especially during March 2020 when there is a large divergence between the actual and model-implied CDS changes. We find that the March 2020 divergence is well accounted for by COVID-specific risks and associated policies, mortality outcomes, and policy announcements, rather than traditional determinants. Daily CDS widening ceased almost immediately after the ECB announced the PEPP, but the divergence between actual and model-implied changes persisted. This points to COVID-19 Dominance: widening spreads during the pandemic has led to unconventional monetary policies that primarily aim to mitigate short-run fears, temporarily pushing away concerns over fiscal risk.
27451.zh_abstract: 我们比较了市场因素与COVID-19动态及政策应对在解释欧元区主权利差方面的重要性。首先，我们估计了2014年1月至2019年6月期间信用违约互换（CDS）利差变化的多因子模型。然后，我们应用一种合成控制类型的程序来外推模型隐含的CDS变化。该因子模型在2019年剩余时间内表现良好，但在疫情期间崩溃，尤其是在2020年3月，实际CDS变化与模型隐含变化之间出现巨大分歧。我们发现，2020年3月的分歧很好地被COVID-19特定风险及相关政策、死亡率结果和政策公告所解释，而非传统决定因素。在欧洲央行宣布PEPP后，每日CDS利差扩大几乎立即停止，但实际变化与模型隐含变化之间的分歧持续存在。这指向了COVID-19主导地位：疫情期间利差扩大导致了非常规货币政策，这些政策主要旨在缓解短期恐慌，暂时推开了对财政风险的担忧。
27451.meta: Programs：IFM, PE；JEL：F3, F34, F41, F45, H12, H5, H51

27450.title: Why Retirement, Social Security, and Age Discrimination Policies Need to Consider the Intersectional Experiences of Older Women
27450.zh_title: 为何退休、社会保障和年龄歧视政策需要考虑老年女性的交叉性经历
27450.authors: Ian Burn, Patrick Button, Theodore F. Figinski, Joanne Song McLaughlin
27450.abstract: We provide an overview of research that indicates that older women face unique challenges and opportunities with respect to work, retirement, Social Security, and age discrimination law. We present estimates of poverty by age and sex, showing that poverty increases with age for women due to older women often outliving their spouses and becoming widowed. We discuss research that shows that women benefit more than men from working longer. We then note that older women face intersectional discrimination that can unfortunately be a barrier to older women working longer. We detail how older women often “fall between the cracks” of the Age Discrimination in Employment Act and Title VII of the Civil Rights Act and are thus not well protected against this intersectional discrimination. As a final example of how women face different circumstances, we summarize research on how older women were differentially negatively impacted by the elimination of Social Security’s Retirement Earnings.
27450.zh_abstract: 我们概述了表明老年女性在工作、退休、社会保障和年龄歧视法律方面面临独特挑战和机遇的研究。我们按年龄和性别呈现了贫困率估计，显示由于老年女性通常比配偶活得更久并成为寡妇，女性的贫困率随年龄增长而上升。我们讨论了表明女性比男性更能从延长工作中受益的研究。然后我们指出，老年女性面临交叉性歧视，这不幸地可能成为她们延长工作的障碍。我们详细说明了老年女性如何常常“落入”《就业年龄歧视法》和《民权法案》第七章的“缝隙”中，因此未能得到针对这种交叉性歧视的良好保护。作为女性面临不同情况的最后一个例子，我们总结了关于老年女性如何因取消社会保障的退休收入测试而受到不同负面影响的的研究。
27450.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H55, J14, J16, J7, K31

27449.title: Social Norms as a Barrier to Women's Employment in Developing Countries
27449.zh_title: 社会规范作为发展中国家女性就业的障碍
27449.abstract: This article discusses cultural barriers to women's participation and success in the labor market in developing countries. I begin by describing how gender norms influence the relationship between economic development and female employment, as well as how gender norms vary substantially across societies at the same level of economic development. I then examine several specific gender-related social norms and how they constrain women's employment. I present examples of policies aimed at dismantling these cultural barriers to female employment and the impacts they have.
27449.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了发展中国家女性参与劳动力市场并取得成功的文化障碍。我首先描述了性别规范如何影响经济发展与女性就业之间的关系，以及性别规范如何在经济发展水平相同的社会之间存在显著差异。然后，我考察了几个特定的性别相关社会规范及其如何限制女性就业。我列举了旨在消除这些女性就业文化障碍的政策实例及其产生的影响。

27448.title: Early Evidence on the Impact of COVID-19 and the Recession on Older Workers
27448.zh_title: COVID-19与经济衰退对老年工人影响的早期证据
27448.authors: Truc Thi Mai Bui, Patrick Button, Elyce G. Picciotti
27448.abstract: We summarize some of the early effects and discuss possible future effects of the COVID-19 pandemic and recession on the employment outcomes of older workers in the United States. We start by discussing what we know about how older workers faired in prior recessions in the United States and how COVID-19 and this recession may differ. We then estimate some early effects of the COVID-19 pandemic and recession on employment and unemployment rates by age group and sex using Current Population Survey data. We calculate employment and unemployment rates multiple ways to account for the complicated employment situation and possible errors in survey enumeration. We find that while previous recessions, in some ways, did not affect employment outcomes for older workers as much, this recession disproportionately affected older workers of ages 65 and older. For example, we find that unemployment rates in April 2020 increased to 15.43% for those ages 65 and older, compared to 12.99% for those ages 25-44. We also find that COVID-19 and the recession disproportionately affected women, where women have reached higher unemployment rates than men, which was consistent for all age groups and unemployment rate measures we used.
27448.zh_abstract: 我们总结了COVID-19大流行和经济衰退对美国老年工人就业结果的一些早期影响，并讨论了可能的未来影响。首先，我们探讨了美国老年工人在以往经济衰退中的表现，以及COVID-19和本次衰退可能的不同之处。接着，我们利用当前人口调查数据，按年龄组和性别估算了COVID-19大流行和经济衰退对就业率和失业率的一些早期影响。我们采用多种方式计算就业率和失业率，以应对复杂的就业状况和调查统计中可能存在的误差。我们发现，尽管以往的经济衰退在某些方面对老年工人的就业结果影响较小，但本次衰退对65岁及以上老年工人的影响尤为严重。例如，2020年4月，65岁及以上人群的失业率上升至15.43%，而25-44岁人群的失业率为12.99%。我们还发现，COVID-19和经济衰退对女性的影响尤为严重，女性的失业率高于男性，这一现象在我们使用的所有年龄组和失业率衡量指标中均保持一致。
27448.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I14, J14, J16, J26

27447.title: Reviving the Salter-Swan Small Open Economy Model
27447.zh_title: 复兴Salter-Swan小型开放经济模型
27447.abstract: This paper provides microfoundations to the Salter-Swan policy framework, a graphical apparatus designed to ascertain the exchange-rate and fiscal stance of a policymaker with internal and external economic targets. The environment is an infinite-horizon small open economy producing tradable and nontradable goods that takes world prices and world interest rates as given and is populated by optimizing households and firms. The economy is subject to terms-of-trade and interest-rate shocks. The internal target of the government is the unemployment rate and the external target is the current account. Downward nominal wage rigidity and financial frictions serve as the rationale for meaningful policy intervention.
27447.zh_abstract: 本文为Salter-Swan政策框架提供了微观基础，该框架是一种图形化工具，旨在确定政策制定者在面对内部和外部经济目标时的汇率和财政立场。环境设定为一个无限期界的小型开放经济体，生产可贸易品和不可贸易品，接受世界价格和世界利率，并由优化行为的家庭和企业组成。该经济体面临贸易条件和利率冲击。政府的内部目标是失业率，外部目标是经常账户。名义工资向下刚性和金融摩擦为有意义的政策干预提供了理由。

27446.title: Measuring Infrastructure in BEA's National Economic Accounts
27446.zh_title: 在BEA国民经济账户中衡量基础设施
27446.authors: Jennifer Bennett, Robert Kornfeld, Daniel Sichel, David Wasshausen
27446.abstract: Infrastructure provides critical support for economic activity, and assessing its role requires reliable measures. This paper provides an overview of U.S. infrastructure data in the National Economic Accounts. After developing definitions of basic, social, and digital infrastructure, we assess trends in each of these categories and their components. Results are mixed depending on the category. Investment in some important types of basic infrastructure has barely or not kept up with depreciation and population growth in recent decades, while some other categories look better. We also show that the average age of most types of infrastructure in the U.S. has been rising, and the remaining service life has been falling. This paper also presents new prototype estimates of state-level investment in highways, highlighting the wide variation across states. In addition, we present new prototype data on maintenance expenditures for highways. In terms of future research, we believe that deprecation rates warrant additional attention given that current estimates are based on 40-year old research and are well below those used in Canada and other countries. We also believe that additional creative work on price indexes for infrastructure would be valuable. Finally, all of the data in this paper will be downloadable on the BEA website, and we hope that the analysis in this paper and the availability of data will spur additional research.
27446.zh_abstract: 基础设施为经济活动提供关键支持，评估其作用需要可靠的衡量指标。本文概述了美国国民经济账户中的基础设施数据。在定义了基础、社会和数字基础设施后，我们评估了每个类别及其组成部分的趋势。结果因类别而异。近几十年来，某些重要类型的基础设施投资几乎未能跟上折旧和人口增长，而其他一些类别则表现较好。我们还发现，美国大多数类型基础设施的平均年龄在上升，剩余服务年限在下降。本文还提出了州级高速公路投资的新原型估算，突显了各州之间的巨大差异。此外，我们提供了高速公路维护支出的新原型数据。关于未来研究，我们认为折旧率值得更多关注，因为当前估算基于40年前的研究，且远低于加拿大等国使用的水平。我们还认为，在基础设施价格指数方面进行更多创造性工作将是有价值的。最后，本文中的所有数据都将在BEA网站上下载，我们希望本文的分析和数据的可用性能够促进进一步的研究。
27446.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, PE, PR；JEL：E01, H4, H54, O4

27445.title: Pollution and Labor Market Search Externalities Over the Business Cycle
27445.zh_title: 经济周期中的污染与劳动力市场搜寻外部性
27445.abstract: We study the relationship between unemployment, environmental policy, and business cycles. We develop a dynamic stochastic general equilibrium real business cycle model that includes both a pollution externality and congestion externalities from labor market search frictions, which generate unemployment. We consider two policies to address the market failures: an emissions tax and a tax or subsidy on job creation. With both policies present, the efficient outcome can be achieved. When one policy is constrained or absent, we solve for the second best. The absence of a vacancy policy to address the congestion externalities substantially affects the value of the emissions tax, both in steady state and over the business cycle.
27445.zh_abstract: 我们研究了失业、环境政策和经济周期之间的关系。我们构建了一个动态随机一般均衡真实商业周期模型，该模型同时包含污染外部性和由劳动力市场搜寻摩擦产生的拥挤外部性，后者导致失业。我们考虑两种政策来解决市场失灵：排放税和对职位创造的税收或补贴。当两种政策同时存在时，可以实现有效结果。当一种政策受到约束或缺失时，我们求解次优方案。缺乏解决拥挤外部性的职位政策会显著影响排放税的价值，无论是在稳态还是经济周期中。

27444.title: Long-Run Effects of Incentivizing Work After Childbirth
27444.zh_title: 产后激励工作的长期影响
27444.abstract: This paper identifies the impact of increasing post-childbirth work incentives on mothers’ long-run careers. We exploit variation in work incentives across mothers based on the timing of a first birth and eligibility for the 1993 expansion of the Earned Income Tax Credit. Ten to nineteen years after a first birth, single mothers who were exposed to the expansion immediately after birth (“early”), rather than 3–6 years later (“late”), have 0.62 more years of work experience and 4.2% higher earnings conditional on working. We show that higher earnings are primarily explained by improved wages due to greater work experience.
27444.zh_abstract: 本文识别了增加产后工作激励对母亲长期职业生涯的影响。我们利用基于首次生育时间和1993年劳动所得税抵免扩大资格的母亲之间工作激励的差异。在首次生育后的十到十九年，产后立即受到扩大政策影响的单身母亲（“早期”），相比于3-6年后才受影响的（“晚期”），拥有多0.62年的工作经验，并且在有工作的情况下收入高出4.2%。我们表明，更高的收入主要归因于因更多工作经验而提高的工资。
27444.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, H24, J16, J20, J22, J24

27443.title: Is Attention Produced Optimally? Theory and Evidence from Experiments with Bandwidth Enhancements
27443.zh_title: 注意力是否被最优生产？来自带宽增强实验的理论与证据
27443.authors: Erin T. Bronchetti, Judd B. Kessler, Ellen B. Magenheim, Dmitry Taubinsky, Eric Zwick
27443.abstract: This paper investigates whether people optimally value tools that reduce attention costs. We call these tools bandwidth enhancements (BEs) and characterize how demand for BEs varies with the pecuniary incentives to be attentive, under the null hypothesis of correct perceptions and optimal choice. We examine if the optimality conditions are satisfied in three experiments. The first is a field experiment (n = 1373) with an online education platform, in which we randomize incentives to complete course modules and incentives to utilize a plan-making tool to complete the modules. In the second experiment (n = 2306), participants must complete a survey in the future. We randomize survey-completion incentives and how long participants must wait to complete the survey, and we elicit willingness to pay for reminders. The third experiment (n = 1465) involves a psychometric task in which participants must identify whether there are more correct or incorrect mathematical equations in an image. We vary incentives for accuracy, elicit willingness to pay to reduce task difficulty, and examine the impact of learning and feedback. In all experiments, demand for reducing attention costs increases as incentives for accurate task completion increase. However, in all experiments—and across all conditions—our tests imply that this increase in demand is too small relative to the null of correct perceptions. These results suggest that people may be uncertain or systematically biased about their attention cost functions, and that experience and feedback do not necessarily eliminate bias.
27443.zh_abstract: 本文研究人们是否最优地重视降低注意力成本的工具。我们将这些工具称为带宽增强，并描述在正确感知和最优选择的零假设下，对带宽增强的需求如何随注意力的金钱激励而变化。我们检验了三个实验中的最优性条件。第一个是线上教育平台的现场实验（n=1373），我们随机分配完成课程模块的激励和使用计划制定工具完成模块的激励。在第二个实验（n=2306）中，参与者必须在未来完成一项调查。我们随机分配调查完成激励和参与者等待完成调查的时间，并引出对提醒的支付意愿。第三个实验（n=1465）涉及一项心理测量任务，参与者必须识别图像中正确或错误的数学方程哪个更多。我们改变准确性的激励，引出降低任务难度的支付意愿，并考察学习和反馈的影响。在所有实验中，随着任务准确完成激励的增加，对降低注意力成本的需求也随之增加。然而，在所有实验和所有条件下，我们的检验表明，相对于正确感知的零假设，这种需求增加太小。这些结果表明，人们可能对其注意力成本函数存在不确定性或系统性偏差，并且经验和反馈不一定能消除偏差。

27442.title: Do Bank Insiders Impede Equity Issuances?
27442.zh_title: 银行内部人是否阻碍股权发行？
27442.authors: Martin Goetz, Luc Laeven, Ross Levine
27442.abstract: We evaluate the role of insider ownership in shaping banks’ equity issuances in response to the global financial crisis. We construct a unique dataset on the ownership structure of U.S. banks and their equity issuances and discover that greater insider ownership leads to less equity issuances. Several tests are consistent with the view that bank insiders are reluctant to reduce their private benefits of control by diluting their ownership through equity issuances. Given the connection between bank equity and lending, the results stress that ownership structure can shape the resilience of banks—and hence the entire economy—to aggregate shocks.
27442.zh_abstract: 我们评估了内部人所有权在塑造银行应对全球金融危机的股权发行中的作用。我们构建了一个关于美国银行所有权结构及其股权发行的独特数据集，发现更高的内部人所有权导致更少的股权发行。多项检验与以下观点一致：银行内部人不愿通过股权发行稀释其所有权，从而减少其控制权的私人收益。鉴于银行股权与贷款之间的联系，结果强调所有权结构可以塑造银行——进而整个经济——对总体冲击的韧性。

27441.title: Optimal Lockdown in a Commuting Network
27441.zh_title: 通勤网络中的最优封锁
27441.authors: Pablo Fajgelbaum, Amit Khandelwal, Wookun Kim, Cristiano Mantovani, Edouard Schaal
27441.abstract: We study optimal dynamic lockdowns against Covid-19 within a commuting network. Our framework integrates canonical spatial epidemiology and trade models, and is applied to cities with varying initial viral spread: Seoul, Daegu and NYC-Metro. Spatial lockdowns achieve substantially smaller income losses than uniform lockdowns. In NYM and Daegu—with large initial shocks—the optimal lockdown restricts inflows to central districts before gradual relaxation, while in Seoul it imposes low temporal but large spatial variation. Actual commuting reductions were too weak in central locations in Daegu and NYM, and too strong across Seoul.
27441.zh_abstract: 我们研究通勤网络中针对COVID-19的最优动态封锁。我们的框架整合了经典空间流行病学和贸易模型，并应用于初始病毒传播程度不同的城市：首尔、大邱和纽约大都市区。空间封锁比统一封锁实现的收入损失小得多。在纽约大都市区和大邱——初始冲击较大——最优封锁在逐步放松前限制流入中心区域，而在首尔则施加较低的时间变化但较大的空间变化。大邱和纽约大都市区中心地点的实际通勤减少过于微弱，而首尔则过于强烈。

27440.title: Endogenous Quality Investments in the U.S. Hospital Market
27440.zh_title: 美国医院市场中的内生质量投资
27440.authors: Craig Garthwaite, Christopher Ody, Amanda Starc
27440.abstract: High and increasing hospital prices have led to calls for price regulation. If prices are high because of consolidation, regulating prices could enhance welfare. However, high prices could also reflect increased willingness to pay by privately insured consumers for clinical and non-clinical quality. If so, regulating prices could reduce quality. We present a model of strategic quality choice where hospitals make quality investments to increase private revenue. We confirm the model's predictions across numerous quality measures including patient satisfaction, hospital processes, risk adjusted mortality, the revealed preferences of current Medicare patients, technology adoption, physician quality, and ED wait times.
27440.zh_abstract: 高昂且不断上涨的医院价格引发了价格监管的呼声。如果价格高企源于市场整合，那么监管价格可以提升社会福利。然而，高价格也可能反映出私人保险患者对临床和非临床质量支付意愿的提高。如果是这样，监管价格可能会降低质量。我们提出了一个战略质量选择模型，其中医院通过质量投资来增加私人收入。我们通过多项质量指标验证了模型的预测，包括患者满意度、医院流程、风险调整后的死亡率、当前医疗保险患者的显示性偏好、技术采用、医生质量以及急诊等待时间。

27439.title: Scarring Body and Mind: The Long-Term Belief-Scarring Effects of COVID-19
27439.zh_title: 身心创伤：COVID-19的长期信念创伤效应
27439.authors: Julian Kozlowski, Laura Veldkamp, Venky Venkateswaran
27439.abstract: The largest economic cost of the COVID-19 pandemic could arise from changes in behavior long after the immediate health crisis is resolved. A potential source of such a long-lived change is scarring of beliefs, a persistent change in the perceived probability of an extreme, negative shock in the future. We show how to quantify the extent of such belief changes and determine their impact on future economic outcomes. We find that the long-run costs for the U.S. economy from this channel is many times higher than the estimates of the short-run losses in output. This suggests that, even if a vaccine cures everyone in a year, the COVID-19 crisis will leave its mark on the US economy for many years to come.
27439.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情最大的经济成本可能源于在直接健康危机解决后长期持续的行为变化。这种长期变化的潜在来源之一是信念创伤，即对未来极端负面冲击感知概率的持久改变。我们展示了如何量化这种信念变化的程度，并确定其对未来经济结果的影响。我们发现，从这一渠道来看，美国经济的长期成本是短期产出损失估计值的数倍。这表明，即使疫苗在一年内治愈所有人，COVID-19危机也将在未来多年对美国经济留下印记。

27438.title: Portfolio Delegation and 401(k) Plan Participant Responses to COVID-19
27438.zh_title: 投资组合委托与401(k)计划参与者对COVID-19的应对
27438.authors: David Blanchett, Michael S. Finke, Jonathan Reuter
27438.abstract: We analyze the behavior of 401(k) plan participants during the first quarter of 2020, when COVID-19 generated historic volatility, large negative returns, and significant unemployment. Only 2.1% of participants invested in TDFs made any changes to their portfolios, with even lower rates of change among those defaulted into robo-advised managed accounts, suggesting that delegation can decrease the likelihood of portfolio mistakes by less sophisticated participants. While 16.6% of non-delegated participants made portfolio changes, these changes were more likely among more sophisticated participants and appear not to have reduced participants’ quarterly returns. Consistent with liquidity constraints, however, withdrawals spike following job loss.
27438.zh_abstract: 我们分析了2020年第一季度401(k)计划参与者的行为，当时COVID-19引发了历史性的波动、巨大的负回报和显著的失业。只有2.1%投资于目标日期基金的参与者对其投资组合进行了任何调整，而那些默认加入机器人顾问管理账户的参与者调整率更低，这表明委托可以降低不太成熟参与者出现投资组合错误的可能性。尽管16.6%的非委托参与者进行了投资组合调整，但这些调整更可能发生在较成熟的参与者中，并且似乎并未降低参与者的季度回报。然而，与流动性约束一致，失业后提款激增。
27438.meta: Programs：AG, AP；JEL：G11, G23, G41, G51, G53

27437.title: Parallel Inverse Aggregate Demand Curves in Discrete Choice Models
27437.zh_title: 离散选择模型中的平行逆总需求曲线
27437.authors: Kory Kroft, René Leal Vizcaíno, Matthew J. Notowidigdo, Ting Wang
27437.abstract: This paper highlights a previously-unnoticed property of commonly-used discrete choice models, which is that they feature parallel demand curves. Specifically, we show that in random utility models, inverse aggregate demand curves shift in parallel with respect to variety if and only if the random utility shocks follow the Gumbel distribution. Using results from Extreme Value Theory, we provide conditions for other distributions to generate parallel demands asymptotically, as the number of varieties increase. We establish these results in the benchmark case of symmetric products, illustrate them using numerical simulations and show that they hold in extended versions of the model with correlated tastes and asymmetric products. Lastly, we provide a “proof of concept” of parallel demands as an economic tool by showing how to use parallel demands to identify the change in consumer surplus from an exogenous change in product variety.
27437.zh_abstract: 本文强调了常用离散选择模型一个此前未被注意的性质，即它们具有平行需求曲线。具体来说，我们证明在随机效用模型中，当且仅当随机效用冲击服从Gumbel分布时，逆总需求曲线会随品种数量平行移动。利用极值理论的结果，我们提供了其他分布渐近产生平行需求的条件，随着品种数量增加。我们在对称产品的基准情形下建立了这些结果，通过数值模拟加以说明，并证明它们在具有相关偏好和非对称产品的扩展模型版本中成立。最后，我们提供了平行需求作为经济工具的“概念验证”，展示了如何利用平行需求来识别产品品种外生变化带来的消费者剩余变化。

27436.title: ‘Mechanization Takes Command’: Inanimate Power and Labor Productivity in Late Nineteenth Century American Manufacturing
27436.zh_title: “机械化主宰一切”：19世纪末美国制造业中的非生命动力与劳动生产率
27436.authors: Jeremy Atack, Robert A. Margo, Paul Rhode
27436.abstract: During the nineteenth century, the US manufacturing sector shifted away from the “hand labor” mode of production, characteristic of artisan shops, to the “machine labor” of the factory. This was the focus of an extremely detailed but extraordinarily complex study by the Commissioner of Labor published in 1899 that has until now defied systematic analysis. Here, we explore the overall productivity gains associated with these changes in production methods and the specific, causal role of inanimate power. Under the machine labor mode, the time necessary to complete production tasks declined by 85 percent, a remarkable gain in labor productivity. We also present OLS and IV estimates of the effects of using inanimate power, such as steam, at the production operation level Our IV is based on the gerunds describing the various production activities. Treating our IV estimates as causal, about one-third of the higher productivity of machine labor is attributed to greater use of inanimate power per se.
27436.zh_abstract: 在19世纪，美国制造业从工匠作坊特有的“手工劳动”生产模式转向工厂的“机器劳动”模式。这是劳工专员于1899年发表的一项极其详细但异常复杂研究的焦点，该研究至今未能进行系统分析。在此，我们探讨了与这些生产方式变化相关的整体生产率提升，以及非生命动力的具体因果作用。在机器劳动模式下，完成生产任务所需的时间下降了85%，这是劳动生产率的显著提升。我们还提供了在生产操作层面使用非生命动力（如蒸汽）效应的OLS和IV估计。我们的IV基于描述各种生产活动的动名词。将我们的IV估计视为因果关系，机器劳动更高生产率的大约三分之一归因于非生命动力本身更广泛的使用。

27435.title: Barbarians at the Store? Private Equity, Products, and Consumers
27435.zh_title: 门口的野蛮人？私募股权、产品与消费者
27435.authors: Cesare Fracassi, Alessandro Previtero, Albert W. Sheen
27435.abstract: We investigate the effects of private equity on product markets using price and sales data for an extensive number of consumer products. Following a buyout, target firms increase sales 50% more than matched control firms. Price increases—roughly 1% on existing products—do not drive this growth. The launch of new products and geographic expansion do. Competitors lose shelf space and marginally raise prices. Results for public vs. private targets, during and after the financial crisis, and in industries that vary in structure suggest private equity tailors strategies to the environment, eases financial constraints, and provides expertise to manage growth.
27435.zh_abstract: 我们利用大量消费品的价格和销售数据，调查私募股权对产品市场的影响。在收购后，目标公司的销售额增长比匹配的对照组公司高出50%。现有产品的价格上涨约1%并非这一增长的主要驱动力。新产品的推出和地理扩张才是增长来源。竞争对手失去货架空间并小幅提价。对公共与私人目标公司、金融危机期间及之后以及结构各异的行业的结果表明，私募股权会根据环境调整策略，缓解财务约束，并提供管理增长的专业知识。

27434.title: The Macroeconomics of Sticky Prices with Generalized Hazard Functions
27434.zh_title: 具有广义风险函数的粘性价格宏观经济学
27434.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francesco Lippi, Aleksei Oskolkov
27434.abstract: We give a thorough analytic characterization of a large class of sticky-price models where the firm’s price setting behavior is described by a generalized hazard function. Such a function provides a tractable description of the firm’s price setting behavior and allows for a vast variety of empirical hazards to be fitted. This setup is microfounded by random menu costs as in Caballero and Engel (1993) or, alternatively, by information frictions as in Woodford (2009). We establish two main results. First, we show how to identify all the primitives of the model, including the distribution of the fundamental adjustment costs and the implied generalized hazard function, using the distribution of price changes or the distribution of spell durations. Second, we derive a sufficient statistic for the aggregate effect of a monetary shock: given an arbitrary generalized hazard function, the cumulative impulse response to a once-and-for-all monetary shock is given by the ratio of the kurtosis of the steady-state distribution of price changes over the frequency of price adjustment times six. We prove that Calvo’s model yields the upper bound and Golosov and Lucas’ model the lower bound on this measure within the class of random menu cost models.
27434.zh_abstract: 我们对一大类粘性价格模型进行了彻底的分析刻画，其中企业的定价行为由广义风险函数描述。该函数提供了企业定价行为的可处理描述，并允许拟合各种经验风险函数。这一设定基于Caballero和Engel（1993）的随机菜单成本，或者Woodford（2009）的信息摩擦。我们建立了两个主要结果。首先，我们展示了如何利用价格变化分布或持续时间分布来识别模型的所有基本要素，包括基本调整成本的分布和隐含的广义风险函数。其次，我们推导了货币冲击总体效应的充分统计量：给定任意广义风险函数，对一次性货币冲击的累积脉冲响应等于稳态价格变化分布的峰度除以价格调整频率再乘以六。我们证明，在随机菜单成本模型类别中，Calvo模型给出了该度量的上界，而Golosov和Lucas模型给出了下界。

27433.title: Do Interactions with Candidates Increase Voter Support and Participation? Experimental Evidence from Italy
27433.zh_title: 与候选人的互动是否会增加选民支持和参与？来自意大利的实验证据
27433.abstract: We test whether politicians can use direct contact to reconnect with citizens, increase turnout, and win votes. During the 2014 Italian municipal elections, we randomly assigned 26,000 voters to receive visits from city council candidates, canvassers supporting the candidates' list, or to a control group. While canvassers’ visits increased turnout by 1.8 percentage points, candidates’ had no impact on participation. Candidates increased their own vote share in the precincts they canvassed, but only at the expense of other candidates on the list. This suggests that their failure to mobilize nonvoters resulted from focusing on securing the preferences of active voters.
27433.zh_abstract: 我们检验了政治家是否可以通过直接接触来重新联系公民、提高投票率并赢得选票。在2014年意大利市政选举期间，我们将26,000名选民随机分配接受市议会候选人的拜访、支持候选人名单的拉票员的拜访，或作为对照组。虽然拉票员的拜访使投票率提高了1.8个百分点，但候选人的拜访对参与没有影响。候选人增加了他们拉票选区的自身得票率，但这仅以牺牲名单上其他候选人的利益为代价。这表明，他们未能动员非选民的原因在于专注于争取活跃选民的偏好。

27432.title: Fear, Lockdown, and Diversion: Comparing Drivers of Pandemic Economic Decline 2020
27432.zh_title: 恐惧、封锁与分流：比较2020年疫情经济衰退的驱动因素
27432.abstract: The collapse of economic activity in 2020 from COVID-19 has been immense. An important question is how much of that resulted from government restrictions on activity versus people voluntarily choosing to stay home to avoid infection. This paper examines the drivers of the collapse using cellular phone records data on customer visits to more than 2.25 million individual businesses across 110 different industries. Comparing consumer behavior within the same commuting zones but across boundaries with different policy regimes suggests that legal shutdown orders account for only a modest share of the decline of economic activity (and that having county-level policy data is significantly more accurate than state-level data). While overall consumer traffic fell by 60 percentage points, legal restrictions explain only 7 of that. Individual choices were far more important and seem tied to fears of infection. Traffic started dropping before the legal orders were in place; was highly tied to the number of COVID deaths in the county; and showed a clear shift by consumers away from larger/busier stores toward smaller/less busy ones in the same industry. States repealing their shutdown orders saw identically modest recoveries--symmetric going down and coming back. The shutdown orders did, however, have significantly reallocate consumer activity away from “nonessential” to “essential” businesses and from restaurants and bars toward groceries and other food sellers.
27432.zh_abstract: 2020年新冠疫情导致的经济活动崩溃规模巨大。一个重要问题是，这种崩溃在多大程度上源于政府限制活动的措施，而非人们为避疫自愿居家。本文利用超过225万家个体企业（涵盖110个不同行业）的顾客访问手机记录数据，考察了经济崩溃的驱动因素。通过比较同一通勤区内、但跨越不同政策边界的消费者行为，发现法定封锁令仅能解释经济活动下降的一小部分（且县级政策数据比州级数据准确得多）。尽管整体消费者流量下降了60个百分点，但法律限制仅解释了其中7个百分点。个人选择远更为重要，且似乎与对感染的恐惧相关：流量在法律命令实施前就已开始下降；与县内新冠死亡人数高度相关；消费者明显从同行业中规模更大/更繁忙的商店转向规模更小/更不繁忙的商店。撤销封锁令的州经历了同样微弱的复苏——下降与回升呈对称性。然而，封锁令确实显著地将消费者活动从“非必要”企业重新分配至“必要”企业，并从餐馆和酒吧转向杂货店和其他食品销售商。
27432.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E6, H7, L51

27431.title: The Economic Impacts of COVID-19: Evidence from a New Public Database Built Using Private Sector Data
27431.zh_title: 新冠疫情的经济影响：基于私营部门数据构建的新公共数据库的证据
27431.authors: Raj Chetty, John N. Friedman, Michael Stepner, The Opportunity Insights Team,
27431.abstract: We build a publicly available database that tracks economic activity in the U.S. at a granular level in real time using anonymized data from private companies. We report weekly statistics on consumer spending, business revenues, job postings, and employment rates disaggregated by county, sector, and income group. Using the publicly available data, we show how the COVID- 19 pandemic affected the economy by analyzing heterogeneity in its impacts across subgroups. High-income individuals reduced spending sharply in March 2020, particularly in sectors that require in-person interaction. This reduction in spending greatly reduced the revenues of small businesses in affluent, dense areas. Those businesses laid off many of their employees, leading to widespread job losses, especially among low-wage workers in such areas. High-wage workers experienced a “V-shaped” recession that lasted a few weeks, whereas low-wage workers experienced much larger, more persistent job losses. Even though consumer spending and job postings had recovered fully by December 2021, employment rates in low-wage jobs remained lower in areas that were initially hard hit, indicating that the job losses due to the demand shock led to a persistent reduction in labor supply. Building on this diagnostic analysis, we evaluate the impacts of fiscal stimulus policies designed to stem the downward spiral in economic activity. Cash stimulus payments led to sharp increases in spending early in the pandemic, but much smaller responses later in the pandemic, especially for high-income households. Real-time estimates of marginal propensities to consume provided better forecasts of the impacts of subsequent rounds of stimulus payments than historical estimates. Overall, our findings suggest that fiscal policies can stem secondary declines in consumer spending and job losses, but cannot restore full employment when the initial shock to consumer spending arises from health concerns. More broadly, our analysis demonstrates how public statistics constructed from private sector data can support many research and real-time policy analyses, providing a new tool for empirical macroeconomics.
27431.zh_abstract: 我们利用私营公司的匿名数据，构建了一个公开可用的数据库，以精细粒度实时追踪美国经济活动。我们报告了按县、行业和收入群体分类的消费者支出、企业收入、职位发布和就业率的每周统计数据。利用这些公开数据，我们通过分析疫情对不同子群体影响的异质性，展示了新冠疫情如何影响经济。高收入个体在2020年3月大幅削减支出，尤其是在需要面对面互动的行业。这种支出削减极大地减少了富裕、密集地区小企业的收入。这些企业解雇了许多员工，导致广泛的失业，尤其是这些地区的低工资工人。高工资工人经历了一场持续数周的“V型”衰退，而低工资工人则经历了更大、更持久的失业。尽管到2021年12月消费者支出和职位发布已完全恢复，但最初受重创地区的低工资岗位就业率仍然较低，表明需求冲击导致的失业引发了劳动力供应的持续减少。基于这一诊断分析，我们评估了旨在阻止经济活动螺旋式下降的财政刺激政策的影响。现金刺激支付在疫情初期导致支出急剧增加，但在疫情后期反应小得多，尤其是对高收入家庭。与历史估计相比，边际消费倾向的实时估计能更好地预测后续几轮刺激支付的影响。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，财政政策可以阻止消费者支出和失业的二次下降，但当消费者支出的初始冲击源于健康担忧时，无法恢复充分就业。更广泛地说，我们的分析展示了由私营部门数据构建的公共统计数据如何支持众多研究和实时政策分析，为实证宏观经济学提供了一种新工具。
27431.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E0, H0, J0

27430.title: Epidemics in the New Keynesian Model
27430.zh_title: 新凯恩斯模型中的流行病
27430.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
27430.abstract: This paper documents the behavior of key macro aggregates in the wake of the Covid epidemic. We show that a unique feature of the Covid recession is that the peak-to-trough decline is roughly the same for consumption, investment, and output. In contrast to the 2008 recession, there was only a short-lived rise in financial stress that quickly subsided. Finally, there was mild deflation between the peak and the trough of the Covid recession. We argue that a New Keynesian model that explicitly incorporates epidemic dynamics captures these qualitative features of the Covid recession. A key feature of the model is that Covid acts like a negative shock to the demand for consumption and the supply of labor.
27430.zh_abstract: 本文记录了新冠疫情后主要宏观总量的行为。我们表明，新冠衰退的一个独特特征是消费、投资和产出的峰谷下降幅度大致相同。与2008年衰退相比，金融压力仅短暂上升并迅速消退。最后，在新冠衰退的峰谷之间出现了温和的通缩。我们认为，明确纳入流行病动态的新凯恩斯模型捕捉了新冠衰退的这些定性特征。该模型的一个关键特征是，新冠如同对消费需求和劳动力供给的负面冲击。

27429.title: Informality, Consumption Taxes and Redistribution
27429.zh_title: 非正规经济、消费税与再分配
27429.authors: Pierre Bachas, Lucie Gadenne, Anders Jensen
27429.abstract: Can taxes on consumption redistribute in developing countries? Contrary to consensus, we show that taxing consumption is progressive once we account for informal consumption. Using household expenditure surveys in 32 countries we proxy for informal consumption using the type of store where purchases occur. We find that the budget share spent in informal stores steeply declines with income, so that the effective tax rate of a broad consumption tax rises with income. Our findings imply that the widespread policy of exempting food from taxation cannot be justified on equity grounds in low-income-countries.
27429.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，消费税能否实现再分配？与共识相反，我们表明，一旦考虑非正规消费，对消费征税是累进的。利用32个国家的家庭支出调查，我们根据购买发生的商店类型来代理非正规消费。我们发现，在非正规商店的支出份额随收入急剧下降，因此广泛消费税的有效税率随收入上升。我们的发现意味着，在低收入国家，普遍存在的食品免税政策无法在公平性上得到合理证明。
27429.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：E26, H21, H23, O12, O23

27428.title: Revisiting the Hypothesis of High Discounts and High Unemployment
27428.zh_title: 重新审视高贴现率与高失业率的假说
27428.authors: Paolo Martellini, Guido Menzio, Ludo Visschers
27428.abstract: We revisit the hypothesis that cyclical fluctuations in unemployment are caused by shocks to the discount rate. We use a rich search-theoretic model of the labor market in which the UE, EU and EE rates are all endogenous. Analytically, we show that an increase in the discount rate lowers the UE rate and, under some natural conditions, it lowers the EU rate. Quantitatively, we show that an increase in the discount rate from 4 to 10% generates a 3.5% decline in the UE rate and a 6% decline in the EU rate. The response of the unemployment rate is minuscule. These findings are at odds with the actual behavior of the US labor market over the business cycle, which features a negative comovement between the UE and EU rates and large unemployment fluctuations. We show that aggregate productivity shocks generate the correct comovement between the UE and EU rates, as well as large unemployment fluctuations.
27428.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了失业的周期性波动是由贴现率冲击引起的假说。我们使用一个丰富的劳动力市场搜索理论模型，其中UE率、EU率和EE率都是内生的。在分析上，我们表明贴现率上升会降低UE率，并且在某些自然条件下，会降低EU率。在数量上，我们表明贴现率从4%上升到10%会导致UE率下降3.5%，EU率下降6%。失业率的反应微乎其微。这些发现与美国劳动力市场在商业周期中的实际行为不符，后者表现为UE率和EU率之间的负相关以及巨大的失业波动。我们表明，总生产率冲击产生了UE率和EU率之间的正确相关性，以及巨大的失业波动。

27427.title: COVID-19 and the Demand for Online Food Shopping Services: Empirical Evidence from Taiwan
27427.zh_title: 新冠疫情与在线食品购物服务需求：来自台湾的经验证据
27427.abstract: We investigate how the coronavirus pandemic affected the demand for online food shopping services using data from the largest agri-food e-commerce platform in Taiwan. We find that an additional confirmed case of COVID-19 increased sales by 5.7% and the number of customers by 4.9%. The demand for grains, fresh fruit and vegetables, and frozen foods increased the most, which benefited small farms over agribusinesses. Online food shopping was highly responsive to COVID-19 media coverage and online content. Because Taiwan did not impose a stay-at-home order, the demand for online food shopping may be similar in other countries after they lift mobility restrictions.
27427.zh_abstract: 我们利用台湾最大的农产品电商平台数据，调查了新冠疫情如何影响在线食品购物服务需求。我们发现，每增加一例新冠确诊病例，销售额增长5.7%，顾客数量增长4.9%。谷物、新鲜水果蔬菜和冷冻食品的需求增长最大，这使小农场比农业企业受益更多。在线食品购物对新冠媒体报道和在线内容高度敏感。由于台湾未实施居家令，其他国家在解除出行限制后，对在线食品购物的需求可能与此类似。

27426.title: Implications of the Covid-19 Pandemic for State Government Tax Revenues
27426.zh_title: 新冠疫情对州政府税收收入的影响
27426.abstract: We assess the Covid-19 pandemic’s implications for state government sales and income tax revenues. We estimate that the economic declines implied by recent forecasts from the Congressional Budget Office will lead to a shortfall of roughly $\$106$ billion in states’ sales and income tax revenues for the 2021 fiscal year. This is equivalent to 0.5 percent of GDP and 11.5 percent of our pre-Covid sales and income tax projection. Additional tax shortfalls from the second quarter of 2020 may amount to roughly $\$42$ billion. We discuss how these revenue declines fit into several pieces of the broader economic context. These include other revenues (e.g., university tuition and fees) that are also at risk, as well as assets (e.g., pension plan holdings) that are at risk. Further dimensions of context include support enacted through several pieces of federal legislation, as well as spending needs necessitated by the public health crisis itself.
27426.zh_abstract: 我们评估了新冠疫情对州政府销售税和所得税收入的影响。我们估计，根据国会预算办公室近期预测所隐含的经济下滑，将导致2021财年各州销售税和所得税收入缺口约1060亿美元。这相当于GDP的0.5%，占我们疫情前销售税和所得税预测的11.5%。2020年第二季度额外的税收缺口可能约为420亿美元。我们讨论了这些收入下降如何融入更广泛经济背景的几个方面。这些方面包括同样面临风险的其他收入（例如大学学费和杂费），以及面临风险的资产（例如养老金计划持有量）。背景的其他维度包括通过几项联邦立法提供的支持，以及公共卫生危机本身所必需的支出需求。

27425.title: Transatlantic Technologies: The Role of ICT in the Evolution of U.S. and European Productivity Growth
27425.zh_title: 跨大西洋技术：ICT在美国和欧洲生产率增长演变中的作用
27425.abstract: We examine the role of the ICT revolution in driving productivity growth behavior for the United States and an aggregate of ten Western European nations (the EU-10) from 1977 to 2015. We find that the standard growth accounting approach is deficient when it separates sources of growth between ICT capital deepening and TFP growth, because much of the effect of the ICT revolution was channeled through spillovers to TFP growth rather than being limited to the capital deepening pathway. Using industry-level data from EU KLEMS, we find that most of the 1995-2005 U.S. productivity growth revival was driven by ICT-intensive industries producing market services and computer hardware. In contrast the EU-10 experienced a 1995-2005 growth slowdown due to a paucity of ICT investment, a failure to capture the efficiency benefits of ICT, and performance shortfalls in specific industries including ICT production, finance-insurance, retail-wholesale, and agriculture. After 2005 both the U.S. and the EU-10 suffered a growth slowdown, indicating that the benefits of the ICT revolution were temporary rather than providing a new permanent era of faster productivity growth. This joint transatlantic post-2005 slowdown is consistent with the broader view that ongoing innovation has been less potent in boosting productivity growth compared to earlier decades of the postwar era.
27425.zh_abstract: 我们考察了ICT革命在驱动1977年至2015年美国与十个西欧国家（EU-10）总体生产率增长行为中的作用。我们发现，当标准增长核算方法将增长来源分离为ICT资本深化和TFP增长时存在缺陷，因为ICT革命的许多效应是通过对TFP增长的溢出效应传导的，而非仅限于资本深化路径。利用EU KLEMS的行业层面数据，我们发现1995-2005年美国生产率增长复苏的大部分是由生产市场服务和计算机硬件的ICT密集型行业驱动的。相比之下，EU-10在1995-2005年经历了增长放缓，原因是ICT投资不足、未能获取ICT的效率收益，以及特定行业（包括ICT生产、金融保险、零售批发和农业）的表现不佳。2005年后，美国和EU-10都经历了增长放缓，表明ICT革命的收益是暂时的，而非提供了一个生产率更快增长的永久新纪元。这种跨大西洋共同的2005年后放缓，与更广泛的看法一致，即与战后时代早期几十年相比，持续的创新在提升生产率增长方面效果较弱。
27425.meta: Programs：EFG, PR；JEL：E01, E24, O33, O47, O51, O52

27424.title: Local Polynomial Order in Regression Discontinuity Designs
27424.zh_title: 断点回归设计中的局部多项式阶数选择
27424.authors: Zhuan Pei, David S. Lee, David Card, Andrea Weber
27424.abstract: Treatment effect estimates in regression discontinuity (RD) designs are often sensitive to the choice of bandwidth and polynomial order, the two important ingredients of widely used local regression methods. While Imbens and Kalyanaraman (2012) and Calonico, Cattaneo and Titiunik (2014) provide guidance on bandwidth, the sensitivity to polynomial order still poses a conundrum to RD practitioners. It is understood in the econometric literature that applying the argument of bias reduction does not help resolve this conundrum, since it would always lead to preferring higher orders. We therefore extend the frameworks of Imbens and Kalyanaraman (2012) and Calonico, Cattaneo and Titiunik (2014) and use the asymptotic mean squared error of the local regression RD estimator as the criterion to guide polynomial order selection. We show in Monte Carlo simulations that the proposed order selection procedure performs well, particularly in large sample sizes typically found in empirical RD applications. This procedure extends easily to fuzzy regression discontinuity and regression kink designs.
27424.zh_abstract: 在断点回归（RD）设计中，处理效应估计通常对带宽和多项式阶数的选择非常敏感，而这两者是广泛使用的局部回归方法的关键组成部分。虽然Imbens和Kalyanaraman（2012）以及Calonico、Cattaneo和Titiunik（2014）为带宽选择提供了指导，但多项式阶数的敏感性仍然给RD实践者带来难题。计量经济学文献中普遍认为，应用偏差缩减的论点无助于解决这一难题，因为它总是倾向于选择更高阶的多项式。因此，我们扩展了Imbens和Kalyanaraman（2012）以及Calonico、Cattaneo和Titiunik（2014）的框架，使用局部回归RD估计量的渐近均方误差作为准则来指导多项式阶数的选择。我们在蒙特卡洛模拟中表明，所提出的阶数选择程序表现良好，特别是在实证RD应用中常见的较大样本量下。该程序可以轻松扩展到模糊断点回归和回归扭结设计。

27423.title: The Changing Risk and Burden of Wildfire in the US
27423.zh_title: 美国野火风险与负担的变化
27423.authors: Marshall Burke, Anne Driscoll, Jenny Xue, Sam Heft-Neal, Jennifer Burney, Michael Wara
27423.abstract: Recent dramatic and deadly increases in global wildfire activity have increased attention on the causes of wildfires, their consequences, and how risk from fire might be mitigated. Here we bring together data on the changing risk and societal burden of wildfire in the US. We estimate that nearly 50 million homes are currently in the wildland-urban interface in the US, a number increasing by 1 million houses every 3 years. Using a statistical model that links satellite-based fire and smoke data to pollution monitoring stations, we estimate that wildfires have accounted for up to 25% of PM₂․₅ in recent years across the US, and up to half in some Western regions. We then show that ambient exposure to smoke-based PM₂․₅ does not follow traditional socioeconomic exposure gradients. Finally, using stylized scenarios, we show that fuels management interventions have large but uncertain impacts on health outcomes, and that future health impacts from climate-change-induced wildfire smoke could approach projected overall increases in temperature-related mortality from climate change. We draw lessons for research and policy.
27423.zh_abstract: 近期全球野火活动的急剧增加和致命性提高，使得人们对野火的原因、后果以及如何减轻火灾风险的关注度上升。在此，我们汇集了关于美国野火风险变化和社会负担的数据。我们估计，目前美国有近5000万套住房位于荒野-城市交界区，且这一数字每三年增加100万套。通过使用一个将基于卫星的火灾和烟雾数据与污染监测站联系起来的统计模型，我们估计近年来野火占美国PM₂․₅的比例高达25%，在西部某些地区甚至达到一半。然后，我们表明，基于烟雾的PM₂․₅的环境暴露并不遵循传统的社会经济暴露梯度。最后，通过使用典型情景，我们表明燃料管理干预措施对健康结果有巨大但不确定的影响，并且由气候变化引起的野火烟雾的未来健康影响可能接近气候变化导致的温度相关死亡率预计总体增加。我们为研究和政策汲取了教训。

27422.title: What Jobs are Being Done at Home During the Covid-19 Crisis? Evidence from Firm-Level Surveys
27422.zh_title: 新冠危机期间哪些工作正在家中完成？来自企业层面调查的证据
27422.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Zoe B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
27422.abstract: The threat of COVID-19 has increased the health risks of going to an office or factory, leading more workers to do their jobs remotely. In this paper, we provide results from firm surveys on both small and large businesses on the prevalence and productivity of remote work, and expectations about the persistence of remote work once the COVID-19 crisis ends. We present four main findings. First, while overall levels of remote work are high, there is considerable variation across industries. The Dingel and Neiman (2020) measure of suitability for remote work does a remarkably good job of predicting the industry level patterns of remote work - highlighting the challenge of moving many industries to remote work. Second, remote work is much more common in industries with better educated and better paid workers. Third, in our larger survey, employers think that there has been less productivity loss from remote working in better educated and higher paid industries. Fourth, more than one-third of firms that had employees switch to remote work believe that remote work will remain more common at their company even after the COVID-19 crisis ends.
27422.zh_abstract: COVID-19的威胁增加了去办公室或工厂的健康风险，导致更多员工远程工作。在本文中，我们提供了针对小型和大型企业的关于远程工作普及率和生产力，以及COVID-19危机结束后远程工作持续预期的调查结果。我们提出了四个主要发现。首先，虽然远程工作的总体水平很高，但各行业之间存在显著差异。Dingel和Neiman（2020）对远程工作适宜性的衡量指标在预测行业层面的远程工作模式方面表现出色——这凸显了将许多行业转向远程工作的挑战。其次，远程工作在受教育程度更高、薪酬更高的行业中更为普遍。第三，在我们的较大规模调查中，雇主认为在受教育程度更高、薪酬更高的行业中，远程工作的生产力损失较小。第四，超过三分之一的让员工转向远程工作的公司认为，即使在COVID-19危机结束后，远程工作在其公司仍将更加普遍。

27421.title: Tech Clusters
27421.abstract: Tech clusters like Silicon Valley play a central role for modern innovation, business competitiveness, and economic performance. This paper reviews what constitutes a tech cluster, how they function internally, and the degree to which policy makers can purposefully foster them. We describe the growing influence of advanced technologies for businesses outside of traditional tech fields, the strains and backlash that tech clusters are experiencing, and emerging research questions for theory and empirical work.
27421.zh_abstract: 像硅谷这样的科技集群对现代创新、企业竞争力和经济表现起着核心作用。本文回顾了科技集群的构成、其内部运作方式，以及政策制定者能够在多大程度上有意地培育它们。我们描述了先进技术对传统科技领域之外的企业日益增长的影响、科技集群正在经历的紧张和反弹，以及理论和实证研究方面出现的新研究问题。
27421.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：L26, M13, O30, O31, R11, R12

27420.title: A Behavioral Explanation for the Puzzling Persistence of the Aggregate Real Exchange Rate
27420.zh_title: 对实际汇率总体水平令人费解的持续性的行为解释
27420.authors: Mario J. Crucini, Mototsugu Shintani, Takayuki Tsuruga
27420.abstract: At the aggregate level, the evidence that deviations from purchasing power parity (PPP) are too persistent to be explained solely by nominal rigidities has long been a puzzle (Rogoff, 1996). Another puzzle from the micro price evidence of the law of one price (LOP), which is the basic building block of PPP, is that LOP deviations are less persistent than PPP deviations. To reconcile the empirical evidence, we adapt the model of behavioral inattention in Gabaix (2014, 2020) to a simple two-country sticky-price model. We propose a simple test of behavioral inattention and find strong evidence in its favor using micro price data from US and Canadian cities.
